hero_subtitle: Full-service lawn maintenance, landscaping, and landscape materials for residential and commercial properties across the Barrington area. Trusted for over 45 years.
service_area_description: Serving Barrington, Barrington Hills, South Barrington, Lake Barrington, Inverness, and the surrounding northwest suburban communities.
seo_title: Down To Earth Landscaping | Lawn Care & Landscaping in Barrington, IL
seo_description: Down To Earth Landscaping in Barrington, IL. Full-service lawn maintenance, landscaping, snow removal, and landscape materials since 1979. Call 847-426-1150.
services_subtitle: From weekly lawn care to bulk landscape materials, we deliver the full package for homeowners and contractors across the northwest suburbs.
reviews_subtitle: Barrington homeowners and businesses trust Down To Earth for reliable, quality landscaping year-round.
cta_subtitle: Get a free estimate from Barrington's most experienced landscaping team. No pressure, just honest advice.
footer_description: Full-service landscaping and lawn maintenance since 1979. Landscape materials manufacturer and supplier. Serving Barrington and the northwest suburbs of Chicago.

services_featured.name: Lawn Maintenance
services_featured.description: Complete lawn care programs including mowing, edging, fertilization, and seasonal cleanups to keep your property looking pristine all year long.

services_secondary.name: Landscape Design & Installation
services_secondary.description: Custom landscape design, planting, hardscaping, and complete property transformations from concept to completion by our experienced crew.

services_accent.name: Snow Removal
services_accent.description: Reliable commercial and residential snow removal and ice management to keep your property safe through every Illinois winter.

services_wide.name: Landscape Materials & Supply
services_wide.description: Wholesale and retail mulch, soil, sand, stone, gravel, firewood, and nursery plants. We manufacture our own materials — pickup or delivery available.

about_features.title: Family-Owned Since 1979
about_features.description: What started as a small lawn maintenance company has grown into a full-service landscaping and materials supplier trusted by the Barrington community for over four decades.

about_features.title: We Manufacture Our Materials
about_features.description: Unlike other landscapers, we produce our own mulch, soil, and aggregates — meaning better quality and better prices for every project.

about_features.title: Full-Service Year-Round
about_features.description: From spring cleanups to summer maintenance to winter snow removal, we keep your property looking its best in every season.

reviews.name: Karen M.
reviews.text: We've used Down To Earth for over 10 years. They keep our lawn looking amazing and the fall cleanup is always thorough. Wouldn't trust anyone else.

reviews.name: David R.
reviews.text: Great landscaping work and their material yard is fantastic. Picked up mulch and topsoil for a weekend project — fair prices and helpful staff.

reviews.name: Linda S.
reviews.text: Reliable snow removal all winter long. They're always out early and our driveway and walkways are cleared before we leave for work. Highly recommend.
